<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band10_chunk006.pdf#page=21 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band10 p290 -->

<!-- header: SINNING -->

<!-- header: SINNING -->


[[File:Band10_chunk006_p021_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band10_chunk006_p021_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band10_chunk006_p021_img003.jpg|thumb|Ausschnitt aus C, Einsetzung des Abendmahls]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band10 p291 -->
